reasoning: The question asks for the probability that the daily average temperature at Abbeville will be higher on the given resolution date(s) (likely in Nov 2025 - Jan 2026 before the close date) compared to October 26, 2025. Average daily temperatures in Abbeville drop significantly from late October (mean ~11°C) to November (mean ~7.5°C), December (mean ~5°C), and January (mean ~4°C). The probability of a random day in these winter months being warmer than Oct 26 is roughly 8% for January and 20% for November. Due to standard deviations of daily temperatures (~3-4°C), the required probability is relatively low, around 15% on average for a random post-October date.
